Senior AI Engineer

Toronto, ON / Remote (Canada)
AI Engineering

About Lever Demo Corp

Lever Demo Corp builds applied-AI products for the financial services sector.

What you'll do

  • Design and ship LLM-powered features for our research platform.
  • Own the AI-automation pipeline from prompt design through production deployment.
  • Collaborate with analyst teams to ground model outputs in proprietary financial data.

Requirements

  • 5+ years of software engineering, including 2+ years on ML/AI systems.
  • Strong Python; experience with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG).
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS preferred).
